subcodes.first_line: O thou whom the fragrances of God have caused to quiver! When the light of His Being shone forth within the lamp of oneness, it illumined both the horizons and the souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من اهتز من نفحات الله نور هویت چون در زجاجه احدیت روشن گشت آفاق و انفس
subcodes.subjects: @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration, @transcendence; unknowability of God
